theme: staff a clinic against every plausible rush
title: Clinic Roster: Staggering the Boundary Against the Surge Lattice
strategies: trivial: cluster every worker's shift at the same first allowed hour (maximal, undodgeable coverage dip)
greedy: spread the fixed headcount evenly across the allowed start hours anchored at the first one, ignoring the surge sweep entirely

strong: recognize that headcount and shift length are fixed, so the only lever is WHERE the roster's unavoidable low-coverage hours fall; rotate the phase of the uniform roster over every allowed anchor hour and keep the rotation whose worst-case peak queue over the whole surge sweep is smallest
invalid: wrong token count / non-finite values -> rejected by the feasibility gate
